title: 2.4. Preparation for Post-Quantum Cryptography (NZISM)
description: Section 2.4 of the New Zealand Information Security Manual setting out objective, context and controls for agencies preparing for post-quantum cryptography; PDF filename indicates V3.9, November 2025. Issued by NCSC/GCSB.

title: ISM Document - New Zealand Information Security Manual
description: Landing page for the full NZISM document, which contains the Cryptography chapter and the Preparation for Post-Quantum Cryptography section. NCSC/GCSB.

title: New Zealand Information Security Manual (NZISM)
description: GCSB/NCSC overview page for the NZISM, the manual detailing processes and controls for protecting NZ Government information and systems, including PQC preparation guidance.

title: New Zealand Information Security Manual
description: NCSC regulations-and-standards page for the NZISM, NZ Government's baseline information security manual that includes post-quantum cryptography preparation guidance.

title: January 2022 New Zealand Information Security Manual v3.5 Release
description: NCSC news item on the NZISM v3.5 release, which added a new section advising agencies to start planning for migration to post-quantum cryptographic standards. URL returned 404 on verification (site restructured).

title: Annual Report 2024 - Government Communications Security Bureau
description: GCSB Annual Report 2024; references preparing agencies for the impacts of quantum computing on encryption via NZISM guidance, but does not use the explicit term 'post-quantum cryptography'.

title: Cryptographic Services - GCSB
description: GCSB information assurance / cryptographic services page. General cryptographic services description; no explicit PQC reference found.

title: Government told to prepare for quantum computers able to break encryption - RNZ News
description: RNZ (public broadcaster, journalism) news article on NZ government quantum-encryption preparation. Non-institutional journalism source.

title: Post Quantum Government Initiatives by Country and Region
description: GSMA listing of PQC government initiatives by country including NZ. Issued by GSMA (international industry association), not a NZ institution.
